title: Questions from Quarantine: Schools Reopening with Dr. Bourdeaux and Security Mom
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public questions submitted with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, airing every Tuesday, provides guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis, with a specific focus on the challenges of reopening schools. The article positions this discussion within a broader context of public health, higher education policy, and global health security, linking to related expert analyses on topics such as mass migration and the timeline for returning to normal school operations.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列每周二播出，旨在回答公众通过#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交的疑问，为全球危机中的身心健康提供建议，并特别关注学校重新开放所面临的挑战。文章将此次讨论置于公共卫生、高等教育政策和全球健康安全的更广泛背景下，同时链接了相关专家对大规模移民危机、学校恢复正常时间表等问题的分析。
